title: Funding opportunities
description: Schema for data/funding-opportunities.yml. Each entry in `opportunities` describes one funding call.

posted.description: Date this entry was added (YYYY-MM-DD). Used as the RSS pubDate. Do not change when editing an existing entry.

status.description: Current status of the call. Omit to mean Open.

url.description: Canonical link to the call page.

amount.description: Human-readable amount, including currency and any tier details.

amountSort.description: Numeric amount used for sorting. Use the largest applicable value.

deadline.description: Human-readable deadline. May include multiple stages.

deadlineSort.description: Earliest applicable deadline (YYYY-MM-DD), used for sorting.

eligibility.description: Who can apply. May be empty if the source does not specify.

geography.description: Region (e.g. Global, USA, EU, UK, Netherlands).
